ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., world, subsaharan africa) */,
  "location_code" INTEGER /* Location code assigned to the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "area_in_km2" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "population_density_2020" REAL /* Population density of the region as of 2020 */,
  "development_group" TEXT /* Categorization of the region based on development status (e.g., developed, developing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the data belongs to */,
  "year_1990" INTEGER /* Population in 1990 */,
  "year_1995" INTEGER /* Population in 1995 */,
  "year_2000" INTEGER /* Population in 2000 */,
  "year_2005" INTEGER /* Population in 2005 */,
  "year_2010" INTEGER /* Population in 2010 */,
  "year_2015" INTEGER /* Population in 2015 */,
  "year_2020" INTEGER /* Population in 2020 */,
  "density_1990" REAL /* Population density in 1990 */,
  "density_1995" REAL /* Population density in 1995 */,
  "density_2000" REAL /* Population density in 2000 */,
  "density_2005" REAL /* Population density in 2005 */,
  "density_2010" REAL /* Population density in 2010 */,
  "density_2015" REAL /* Population density in 2015 */,
  "density_2020" REAL /* Population density in 2020 */,
  "urban_population_1990" INTEGER /* Urban population in 1990 */,
  "urban_population_1995" INTEGER /* Urban population in 1995 */,
  "urban_population_2000" INTEGER /* Urban population in 2000 */,
  "urban_population_2005" INTEGER /* Urban population in 2005 */,
  "urban_population_2010" INTEGER /* Urban population in 2010 */,
  "urban_population_2015" INTEGER /* Urban population in 2015 */,
  "urban_population_2020" INTEGER /* Urban population in 2020 */,
  "rural_population_1990" INTEGER /* Rural population in 1990 */,
  "rural_population_1995" INTEGER /* Rural population in 1995 */,
  "rural_population_2000" INTEGER /* Rural population in 2000 */,
  "rural_population_2005" INTEGER /* Rural population in 2005 */,
  "rural_population_2010" INTEGER /* Rural population in 2010 */,
  "rural_population_2015" INTEGER /* Rural population in 2015 */,
  "rural_population_2020" INTEGER /* Rural population in 2020 */,
  "median_age_1990" REAL /* Median age of the population in 1990 */,
  "median_age_1995" REAL /* Median age of the population in 1995 */,
  "median_age_2000" REAL /* Median age of the population in 2000 */,
  "median_age_2005" REAL /* Median age of the population in 2005 */,
  "median_age_2010" REAL /* Median age of the population in 2010 */,
  "median_age_2015" REAL /* Median age of the population in 2015 */,
  "median_age_2020" REAL /* Median age of the population in 2020 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population trend entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the trend belongs to */,
  "growth_rate_1990_1995" REAL /* Population growth rate from 1990 to 1995 */,
  "growth_rate_1995_2000" REAL /* Population growth rate from 1995 to 2000 */,
  "growth_rate_2000_2005" REAL /* Population growth rate from 2000 to 2005 */,
  "growth_rate_2005_2010" REAL /* Population growth rate from 2005 to 2010 */,
  "growth_rate_2010_2015" REAL /* Population growth rate from 2010 to 2015 */,
  "growth_rate_2015_2020" REAL /* Population growth rate from 2015 to 2020 */,
  "annual_growth_rate_1990_2020" REAL /* Average annual growth rate from 1990 to 2020 */,
  "urbanization_rate_1990_2020" REAL /* Rate of urbanization from 1990 to 2020 */,
  "population_change_1990_2020" INTEGER /* Total population change from 1990 to 2020 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the request */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the data source is provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source link */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data provided by the source (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., trend analysis, growth analysis) */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been accessed */,
  "last_accessed_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
